title: pilosella subcymigera subsp. alethes
intro: Pilosella subcymigera subsp. alethes, a subspecies of the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella subcymigera subsp. alethes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a sought-after natural remedy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
